name: Cocktail Sandwich Wreath
recipeIngredient: 40 slices Rye or pumpernickel bread (Cocktail bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor bowl with metal blade, process chicken, celery, apple, mayonnaise, lemon juice, salt, and pepper until small pieces remain.
2. Spread softened margarine on one side of each bread slice.
3. Spread 2 heaping teaspoons of the chicken mixture onto each slice.
4. Place a small piece of lettuce on top.
5. Arrange the open-faced sandwiches slightly overlapping on a large platter to form a wreath shape.
6. Garnish as desired. Makes 40 open-faced sandwiches.
7. The wreath can be prepared several hours before serving. Wrap tightly with plastic wrap and refrigerate until serving time.
